record_types.name: MPU_CTRL_Register
MPU_RASR_Register
MPU_RBAR_Register
MPU_RNR_Register

variables.name: MPU_CTRL
variables.code:
MPU_CTRL    : MPU_CTRL_Register
  with Import,
       Volatile,
       Full_Access_Only,
       Address => System.Storage_Elements.To_Address (16#E000_ED94#);

variables.name: MPU_RASR
variables.code:
MPU_RASR    : MPU_RASR_Register
  with Import,
       Volatile,
       Full_Access_Only,
       Address => System.Storage_Elements.To_Address (16#E000_EDA0#);

documentation.description: MPU Region Attribute and Size Register

variables.name: MPU_RBAR
variables.code:
MPU_RBAR    : MPU_RBAR_Register
  with Import,
       Volatile,
       Full_Access_Only,
       Address => System.Storage_Elements.To_Address (16#E000_ED9C#);

variables.name: MPU_RNR
variables.code:
MPU_RNR     : MPU_RNR_Register
  with Import,
       Volatile,
       Full_Access_Only,
       Address => System.Storage_Elements.To_Address (16#E000_ED98#);
